message:
style(tests): use Duration::from_mins/from_hours for readability in test assertions

Replaced Duration::from_secs(60) → Duration::from_mins(1),
Duration::from_secs(120) → Duration::from_mins(2), and
Duration::from_secs(86400 * 365) → Duration::from_hours(8760) across
7 test modules. The semantic Duration constructors make the intended
time spans immediately obvious without mental arithmetic.

Affected modules: circuit_breaker, evidence, quic/config,
websocket/client, obligation_tracker, sync/pool, time/interval.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
